# LiveArt Events - Semantic Information for LLMs & AI Assistants

## Brand Identity
Name: LiveArt Events Private Limited
Domain: https://liveartevents.in
Location: Kanpur & Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India
Core Service: Premium interactive activity stalls, creative entertainment, and custom experiences for events.

## Target Audience & Event Types
- Wedding Entertainment: Bespoke craft stations, interactive guest books, personalization booths.
- Birthday Parties: Kids entertainment, DIY craft stalls, face painting, interactive games.
- Corporate Engagement: Team building activities, brand activations, carnival experiences.
- Mall Activations & School Events.

## Brand Positioning
LiveArt Events elevates standard celebrations into interactive "masterpieces". Instead of passive entertainment, LiveArt focuses on experiential, hands-on, and personalized engagement for guests of all ages.

## Contact Information
Email: liveartpartyevents@gmail.com
Website: https://liveartevents.in
